issues.detail: The skill does not cover error scenarios or edge cases, such as authentication failures or database connection errors.

scenarios.name: Self-host NocoDB on existing Postgres
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses the documented `NC_DB="pg://host:port?u=...&p=...&d=..."` env var with nocodb/nocodb:latest on port 8080 and explains the no-migration UI-layer model, while the baseline invents a DATABASE_URL env var that NocoDB does not consume.

scenarios.name: Filter+sort records via REST API
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses the exact documented endpoint /api/v1/db/data/noco/<project>/<table> with xc-auth header, where=(Status,eq,Active) and sort=-CreatedAt, while the baseline gets the path, auth header, filter and sort syntax all wrong.
